com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.external.contactless

Interface ExtM1Card

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Card, ExtContactlessCard

    public interface ExtM1Card
extends ExtContactlessCard
    Provides M1 card operations.

    How to create a ExtM1Card instance:

         ExtM1Card extM1Card = new ExtM1CardImpl()

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void authenticate(ContactlessKeyMode keyMode, byte[] uid, byte blockNo, byte[] key)
      Authenticates M1 card with the specified key after the card is activated and before reading/writing the card..
      void decrement(byte blockNo, byte[] data)
      Decrement operation of M1 Card.
      void increment(byte blockNo, byte[] data)
      Increment operation of M1 Card.
      byte[] readBlockData(byte blockNo)
      Reads data from the specified block of M1 card after the block is authenticated.
      void restore(byte blockNo)
      Restores M1 card register to invalidate increment/decrement.
      void transfer(byte blockNo)
      Transfers M1 card block after increment/decrement.
      void writeBlockData(byte blockNo, byte[] data)
      Writes data to the specified block of M1 card after the block is authenticated.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.card.contactless.ExtContactlessCard

        activate, deactivate

    • Method Detail

      • authenticate

        void authenticate(ContactlessKeyMode keyMode,
                  byte[] uid,
                  byte blockNo,
                  byte[] key)
           throws NSDKException
        Authenticates M1 card with the specified key after the card is activated and before reading/writing the card..

        Example:

             ActivationResult result;
     try{
         result = extM1Card.activate();
     } catch(NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception.
     }

     ContactlessKeyMode keyMode = ContactlessKeyMode.KEYA_0X00;
     byte[] uid = result.getUID();
     int blockNo = 1;
     byte[] key = new byte[]{(byte) 0xFF, (byte) 0xFF, (byte) 0xFF, (byte) 0xFF, (byte) 0xFF, (byte) 0xFF};

     try {
         extM1Card.m1Authenticate(keyMode, uid, blockNo, key);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception.
     }
        Parameters:
        keyMode - [Required] Key Mode. See ContactlessKeyMode
        uid - [Required] Card serial number, 4 bytes of UID. It is returned when activating the card, see ActivationResult.getUID().
        blockNo - [Required] The block to be authenticated, value range: [0-255].
        key - [Required] The key used to authenticate, 6 bytes.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • readBlockData

        byte[] readBlockData(byte blockNo)
              throws NSDKException
        Reads data from the specified block of M1 card after the block is authenticated.
        Parameters:
        blockNo - [Required] Block index, value range: [0-255].
        Returns:
        Block data, 16 bytes.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • writeBlockData

        void writeBlockData(byte blockNo,
                    byte[] data)
             throws NSDKException
        Writes data to the specified block of M1 card after the block is authenticated.

        Example:

             int blockNo = 1;
     byte[] data = ISOUtils.hex2byte("01000000FEFFFFFF0100000001FE01FE");

     try {
         extM1Card.writeBlockData(blockNo, data);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception.
     }
        Parameters:
        blockNo - [Required] Block index, value range: [0-255].
        data - [Required] Data to write, 16 bytes.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • increment

        void increment(byte blockNo,
               byte[] data)
        throws NSDKException
        Increment operation of M1 Card.

        Example:

             int blockNo = 1;
     byte[] data = ISOUtils.hex2byte("01000000");

     try {
         extM1Card.increment(blockNo, data);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception.
     }
        Parameters:
        blockNo - [Required] Block index, value range: [0-255].
        data - [Required] Value that will be added to the block, 4 bytes data.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • decrement

        void decrement(byte blockNo,
               byte[] data)
        throws NSDKException
        Decrement operation of M1 Card.

        Example:

             int blockNo = 1;
     byte[] data = ISOUtils.hex2byte("01000000");

     try {
         extM1Card.decrement(blockNo, data);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception.
     }
        Parameters:
        blockNo - [Required] Block index, value range: [0-255].
        data - [Required] Value that will be minus from the block, 4 bytes data.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • transfer

        void transfer(byte blockNo)
       throws NSDKException
        Transfers M1 card block after increment/decrement.
        Parameters:
        blockNo - [Required] Block to transfer, value range: [0-255].
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • restore

        void restore(byte blockNo)
      throws NSDKException
        Restores M1 card register to invalidate increment/decrement.
        Parameters:
        blockNo - [Required] Block to restore, value range: [0-255].
        Throws:
        NSDKException
